property.name: data.name
property.description: This is the name of the datatype, which distinguishes it from other types for the purposes of ingest processing and perhaps even for dataflow/transport concerns. As such, this can be used to denote a subtype of some common data format, like CSV files for example, which could originate from any number of sources

property.name: annotation.output.name
property.description: This is the name to use on the data in Accumulo. If not specified, 'data.name' is used by default

property.name: annotation.source.visibility.inherit.event
property.description: enable setting the visibility for annotation source from event

property.name: annotation.source.visibility.default
property.description: default visibility to use for storing annotation source

property.name: annotation.handler.classes
property.description: List of classes that should process each event

property.name: annotation.raw.transform.enable
property.description: enable transformation of raw data using the defined xslt

property.name: annotation.raw.transform.config
property.description: used to transform raw annotation json view (xslt file with xml extension)

property.name: annotation.ignore.unknown.fields
property.description: ignore unknown fields when parsing the annotation json

property.name: annotation.data.category.uuid.fields
property.description: List of known fields that contain UUIDs
